zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Rachel Wilkinson於1528年1月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾豪登時，她的父親Sir Theodore Wilkinson22歲，母親Lady Rachel Eccles18歲。她和Sir William Hodgson III至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1574年在英國越可爾斯吉朋貝可享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Rachel Wilkinson于1528年1月出生在英国英格兰越可爾豪登时，她的父亲Sir Theodore Wilkinson22岁，母亲Lady Rachel Eccles18岁。她和Sir William Hodgson III至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1574年在英国越可爾斯吉朋貝可享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Rachel Wilkinson was born in January 1528, in Howden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Theodore Wilkinson, was 22 and her mother, Lady Rachel Eccles, was 18. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir William Hodgson III. She died in 1574, in Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Rachel Wilkinson est née en janvier 1528, à Howden, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Theodore Wilkinson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Rachel Eccles, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir William Hodgson III. Elle est décédée en 1574, à Skirpenbeck, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Rachel Wilkinson im Januar 1528 in Howden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Theodore Wilkinson 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Rachel Eccles 18. Sie hatte mit Sir William Hodgson III mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1574 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rachel Wilkinson è nata il nel gennaio 1528 nel Howden, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Theodore Wilkinson, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Rachel Eccles, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir William Hodgson III. Morì nel 1574, nel Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Rachel Wilkinsonが1528年1月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホーウデンで生まれた時，父Sir Theodore Wilkinsonは22歳，母Lady Rachel Ecclesは18歳であった。彼女はSir William Hodgson IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1574年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキルペンベックで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Rachel Wilkinson(이)가 1528년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하우든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Theodore Wilkinson(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Rachel Eccles(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Hodgson III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 영국 요르크실르 스커펜벡에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rachel Wilkinson nasceu em janeiro de 1528, em Howden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Theodore Wilkinson, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Rachel Eccles, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir William Hodgson III. Ela faleceu em 1574, em Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Rachel Wilkinson родилась январь 1528 г. в местности хоуден, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Theodore Wilkinson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Rachel Eccles, 18. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir William Hodgson III. Она умерла в 1574 г. в местности скирпенбекк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Rachel Wilkinson nació en enero de 1528, en Howden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Theodore Wilkinson, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Rachel Eccles, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir William Hodgson III. Murió en 1574, en Skirpenbeck, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
